expectations.text: Produces a Context Summary before any phase plan or code, including project name, project type, one-sentence core goal, key requirements, and tech stack signals drawn from the context files
expectations.evidence: Transcript lines 24-51: full Context Summary with Project Name, Project Type, Core Goal, Key Requirements, Tech Stack Signals, and an Open Questions section, all sourced from the two context files.

expectations.text: Correctly surfaces the hard PII/VPC constraint from product-spec.md as either a stated requirement or a blocker/assumption
expectations.evidence: Key Requirements lists 'no PII leaves AWS VPC'; the PII constraint also drives the embedding-model assumption ('open-source model... given the PII/self-hosted constraint').

expectations.text: Proposes a phase-by-phase build plan (multiple discrete phases, each with a goal and deliverables) rather than one big undifferentiated plan
Explicitly pauses and asks for the user's approval before writing any code or creating .project/ scaffolding
expectations.evidence: Line 104: 'let me know your answers... or say approved to start Phase 1'; step 8 in narration confirms it stopped per the skill's pause instruction.

expectations.text: Does not create .project/ files or write project source code in this run, since approval was never granted
expectations.evidence: metrics.json shows 0 files_created; narration step 8 explicitly confirms no .project/, git repo, or application code was created.
